name: veggastare
description: VeggaStare monorepo – frontend (Next.js / Vercel) + backend (Hapi / Railway)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n FE,BE -c cyan,yellow "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend"
scripts.push:dev: git add -A && git commit -m "update" && set VEGGAT_OWNER=1 && git push origin dev
scripts.push:main: git checkout main && git pull origin main && git merge dev && set VEGGAT_OWNER=1 && git push origin main && git checkout dev
